name: python3-cheroot
title: python3-cheroot
description:
Pure-Python HTTP server
Cheroot is the high-performance pure-Python HTTP server used by
CherryPy.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use cheroot because Pure-Python HTTP server.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use cheroot as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cheroot [options] [args]` as documented upstream for cheroot.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair cheroot with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cheroot --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
